Tactics

ChatGPT vs Perplexity vs Claude: Platform Analysis

Michael Torres
March 2, 2026
10 min read

Patient Behavior by Platform

Each AI engine serves distinct patient demographics with unique query patterns and decision stages.

ChatGPT (OpenAI)

  • Demographics: Ages 25-45, tech-savvy, higher education
  • Query Style: "What's the best Botox clinic near me?"
  • Average Case Value: $8,500
  • Monthly Referrals (optimized): 35-50 patients

Perplexity AI

  • Demographics: Ages 30-55, research-oriented, higher income
  • Query Style: Detailed comparisons with citations
  • Average Case Value: $15,000
  • Citation Rate: 89% include verifiable sources

Data Sources

  • [1]OpenAI Platform Demographics Report Q4 2025
  • [2]Perplexity AI User Research Study
  • [3]StackMatrices Platform-Specific ROI Analysis
